subtitle: File transfer across devices
noDevicesHint: Share the room code with others to start transferring

about.tagline: No account, no install — transfer files directly in your browser.
about.whatBody: AnyDrop is a browser-based P2P file transfer tool. Devices on the same local network discover each other automatically. You can also create a private room and connect any two devices using a room code.
about.howBody: Devices communicate directly via WebRTC DataChannel. The signaling server is only used to exchange connection info (SDP and ICE candidates). Once the P2P connection is established, files and messages travel directly between devices — no server in the middle.
about.privacyBody: File contents never touch the server. Everything is transferred peer-to-peer between your device and the recipient. The server stores no files, messages, or personal data.
about.techBody: Frontend: Next.js + Tailwind CSS. Peer-to-peer: WebRTC DataChannel. Signaling: Node.js server on AWS EC2, proxied by Caddy over HTTPS.

errorSignalingUnreachable: Cannot reach signaling server — is it running?
errorInvalidRoomCode: Invalid room code — must be 6 letters or digits

error.roomNotFound: Room not found — check the room code and try again
